title: Simple Blocks
body:
Hello, this pack makes some blocks look simple!

I will be adding more blocks soon. Please note that this is the first version of this pack and there will be bugs, so please report any bugs here:

https://forms.gle/rpb5DDb6Dkvd562o7

Note: Fixed some compatibility issues!

Thank you for using my pack!
